use_cases: Displaying code snippets in documentation with one-click copy functionality
Showing configuration values or API keys that users need to copy
Rendering status messages with semantic colors for success, warning, or error states
Displaying multi-line code blocks in tutorials and developer guides
Creating inline code references in knowledge base articles
ai_summary: A lightweight code snippet component with copy-to-clipboard functionality. Supports multiple display variants including default, inverted, and semantic states (success, warning, error) with optional prompt styling. Features click-triggered animation feedback and customizable width for flexible integration in documentation, tutorials, and developer interfaces.
